\tzpentry{ID3614}{Dimensional Accessibility Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3614 introduces Dimensional Accessibility Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \Delta l &= 0, \pm 1, \pm 2 \\ \Delta m &= 0, \pm 1 \end{align}
